item.title: First UK government flight departs Middle East after delay
item.description: The plane was due to leave Oman on Wednesday but remained grounded due to problems getting passengers on board.

item.title: Labour MP 'voluntarily suspends herself' after husband arrested in China spy probe
item.description: Joani Reid said she had temporarily stood down from the party after her husband was arrested on suspicion of spying for China.

item.title: No UK government ministers to attend Paralympic ceremonies
item.description: No UK government ministers or officials will attend the Winter Paralympics opening and closing ceremonies after Russian and Belarusian athletes were i...

item.title: 'Brave and brilliant, Russell has compelling case as Scotland's greatest'
item.description: Tom English assesses Finn Russell's credentials as one of Scotland's greatest as the fly-half approaches a century of caps.

item.title: Israeli evacuation order for Beirut's southern suburbs sparks panic
item.description: Huge traffic jams form after the unprecedented warning for people to leave the Hezbollah stronghold, as Israel steps up its strikes across Lebanon.
